reason: Verify backend implementation against service, route, database, and testing standards.
Check all API responses and errors follow project conventions.
Review new route handlers for correct App Router structure and validation.
Review query correctness, soft-delete semantics, and cross-table consistency.
Verify new migration/model follows project migration rules.
Check backend tests cover core CRUD, deletion preview, and verification-state paths.
Verify TypeScript and Prisma types are strict and no unsafe shortcuts were introduced.
Verify review-center UI changes meet project frontend expectations.
Check component boundaries and maintainability of the new workbench.
Check UI clarity, status labels, card layout, and edit affordances.
Review React state, effects, refresh flows, and form behavior.
Verify frontend service and prop types align with backend contracts.
Check frontend tests and quality coverage for the new UI.
Review schema/type alignment for new payloads.
Check end-to-end consistency from database to UI.
Verify responsibilities stay within module boundaries.
